input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 21 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 4, "message": "4 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 8, "message": "8 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "general", "count": 8, "message": "8 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 251, "current_utilization": 27, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto Western Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-western", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto Western Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: **Charge Nurse Summary:** Actively monitor for GI and respiratory clusters, initiating infection control for GI and considering isolation for respiratory patients. Capacity is stable for the next two hours, but consider diverting CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Mount Sinai, or Toronto Western, all at 50% utilization, to maintain optimal flow.
